selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest next refined-fuel generic overlay-governance reduction on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the generic rosetta contract parent into controller-facing fences for non-binding overlays, explicit namespace and weak mapping discipline, explicit conflict handling without precedence, anti-identity and anti-gating handling, and non-retroactive kernel-independent overlay lifecycle control.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Next refined-fuel follow-on after the generic rosetta boundary is now reduced.
Strongest current sims follow-on still sitting in the immediate reduction tranche.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the generic overlay-governance boundary tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: OVERLAYS_STAY_EXPLICIT_REMOVABLE_AND_NON_BINDING
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's core rule that overlays are optional annotations only and cannot modify kernel law.

candidate_items.name: OVERLAY_NAMESPACE_AND_SYMBOL_DISCIPLINE_BLOCKS_RETOKENIZATION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps overlay language explicit and prevents it from hardening into hidden kernel syntax or identity claims.

candidate_items.name: OVERLAY_MAPPINGS_STAY_EXPLICIT_WEAK_AND_NON_PRESERVING_BY_DEFAULT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's direct guard against mapping vocabulary turning into hidden structural authority.

candidate_items.name: OVERLAY_PLURALITY_REQUIRES_EXPLICIT_CONFLICT_HANDLING_AND_NO_DEFAULT_PRECEDENCE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent's anti-canonical-overlay posture into a controller-facing fence around merge and conflict handling.

candidate_items.name: OVERLAY_LABELS_AND_LIFECYCLE_CANNOT_REWRITE_IDENTITY_ADMISSION_OR_KERNEL_HISTORY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent's anti-identity and anti-kernel-capture close into a controller-facing fence.

quarantined_items.name: OVERLAY_LANGUAGE_AS_KERNEL_TRUTH_OR_SEMANTIC_AUTHORITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent allows the vocabulary while denying default semantic force, so truth and privileged-interpretation overread must stay quarantined.

quarantined_items.name: OVERLAY_GOVERNANCE_AS_PRECEDENCE_IDENTITY_OR_RETROACTIVE_REWRITE_MACHINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent is valuable precisely because it blocks overlay maintenance and conflict handling from becoming hidden kernel governance.

notes: This batch was produced as the twenty-fifth controller-facing A2-mid reduction in this audit thread.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
